title: Mark Lay
compiled_truth: Mark Lay is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-28), Mark Lay sent 15 and received 68 emails, totalling 83 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (8), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (7), [Fabricio Soares](people/fabricio-soares) (5), [Philippe Bibi](people/philippe-bibi) (4), [David Berberian](people/david-berberian) (3).
